heroLead: Insulspan® insulated and Slimline patio kits — flat-packed, pre-cut, and ready to install. Eight styles for every home.
overviewH2: A patio kit that arrives ready to build.
overviewPara1: Our flat-pack patio kits are engineered in-house by Quick Built Systems, using the same Insulspan® structural insulated panels trusted on homes across Australia. Every component — panels, posts, beams, gutters and fixings — is pre-cut and packed for fast assembly.
overviewPara2: Choose from insulated Insulspan® panels for year-round comfort, or our Slimline high-gloss option for a clean, cost-effective finish. Both systems are available in eight architectural styles to suit attached, freestanding, and gable configurations.
overviewPara3: As a third-generation family business with over 25 years of experience, we supply direct — no middlemen, fast lead times, and full technical support from quote to completion.
stylesCopy: From a simple flat attached patio to a full Dutch gable, every style is available in insulated or Slimline panels.

styles.name: Flat Attached
styles.copy: Fixed to the house wall, simple single-pitch roof.

styles.name: Flat Flyover
styles.copy: Elevated above the roofline for a seamless look.

styles.name: Flat Freestanding
styles.copy: Independent structure, no wall attachment needed.

styles.name: Gable Attached
styles.copy: Classic peaked roof attached to the home.

styles.name: Gable Flyover
styles.copy: Gable roof elevated above the existing roofline.

styles.name: Dutch Gable Attached
styles.copy: Hybrid hip-and-gable roof attached to the home.

styles.name: Dutch Gable Flyover
styles.copy: Dutch gable elevated above the existing roofline.

panelOptions.name: Insulated Patio Panels
panelOptions.copy: The same long-span structural insulated panels used in full home builds. High-density EPS core delivers genuine thermal comfort — cooler in summer, warmer in winter — with a clean pre-finished soffit.

panelOptions.name: High-Gloss Slimline Panels
panelOptions.copy: A cost-effective non-insulated option with a premium high-gloss finish. Lighter weight, fast to install, and ideal for climate zones where full insulation is not required.

advantages.title: 25+ years experience
advantages.copy: Third-generation family business supplying patio kits across Australia since the 1990s.

advantages.title: Flat-pack delivery
advantages.copy: Every component pre-cut and labelled — arrives ready to assemble with no cutting required on site.

advantages.title: Eight architectural styles
advantages.copy: Flat, gable, and Dutch gable in attached, flyover, and freestanding configurations.

advantages.title: Insulspan® technology
advantages.copy: Optional high-performance insulated panels for year-round outdoor comfort.

advantages.title: Full technical support
advantages.copy: Our team guides you from design and quote through to installation, with phone support throughout.

accessoriesH2: Everything you need, in one kit.

accessories.name: Structural posts
accessories.copy: Powdercoated steel or timber posts sized for your span and wind rating.

accessories.name: Beams & connectors
accessories.copy: Engineered beams with all fixings and connection hardware included.

accessories.name: Gutters & downpipes
accessories.copy: Matching fascia gutters and downpipes in Colorbond® colours.

accessories.name: LED downlights
accessories.copy: Recessed downlights installed directly into the Insulspan® panel soffit.

accessories.name: Ceiling fans
accessories.copy: Fan bracket kits for mounting ceiling fans within the panel system.

accessories.name: Skylights
accessories.copy: Factory-cut skylight openings available in all insulated panel styles.
